testcase.name: test_decode_text_with_pii_includes_redaction

failure.message: AssertionError: redaction_notice missing in response keys: ['summary', 'period_label', 'line_items', 'anomalies'] assert 'redaction_notice' in {'anomalies': [], 'line_items': [{'confidence': 0.98, 'contribution_paid': 30.0, 'date': '2026-04-05', 'government_paid': 160.0, ...}], 'period_label': 'April 2026', 'summary': 'This statement shows services provided to John Smith during April 2026. The statement includes two units of personal care services classified under the Independence stream, totaling $190.00. The client contributed $30.00 towards the cost, with the government subsidizing the remaining $160.00.'}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter4.py:166: in test_decode_text_with_pii_includes_redaction assert "redaction_notice" in d, f"redaction_notice missing in response keys: {list(d.keys())}" E AssertionError: redaction_notice missing in response keys: ['summary', 'period_label', 'line_items', 'anomalies'] E assert 'redaction_notice' in {'anomalies': [], 'line_items': [{'confidence': 0.98, 'contribution_paid': 30.0, 'date': '2026-04-05', 'government_paid': 160.0, ...}], 'period_label': 'April 2026', 'summary': 'This statement shows services provided to John Smith during April 2026. The statement includes two units of personal care services classified under the Independence stream, totaling $190.00. The client contributed $30.00 towards the cost, with the government subsidizing the remaining $160.00.'}
